channel.title: Kiwi on Trunk Whorl
channel.description: Recent content in Kiwi on Trunk Whorl

item.title: Designing a Data-Oriented Compiler, Part 2
item.description: A closer look at the trade-offs in object-oriented compiler structures, and why rich node hierarchies eventually start to creak.

item.title: Designing a Data-Oriented Compiler, Part 1
item.description: An introduction to a new series on building a data-oriented compiler, using the Kiwi compiler as the running example.
